method: grep-fallback: portdiff records have no per-symbol tier array (only tier_breakdown counts); pi symbols enumerated from src-coding-agent.graph.json (symbols[].file==path), each grepped (-rwl --include=*.rs) as snake_case/original/SCREAMING (fn/const) or PascalCase (type) across pidgin-coding/src and pidgin-cli/src; zero hits => MISSING. Best-effort: a renamed symbol reads as missing.
